title: MikroTik power supply 24HPOW, 24V 2.5A, power plug (EU)
description: 24HPOW is a power adapter with a maximum output voltage of 24V, a current of max. 2.5A and a total power of 60W. The power adapter has a standard 2.1 / 5.5mm connector. The package includes a power cord GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
